passiveAbilities.name: Pirate Mascot
passiveAbilities.description: When another friendly Pirate within 8" makes a Melee Attack they may gain +2 Melee Stat for the action, or if they are targeted by an Arcane Ability, they may gain -1 Evade Stat for the action.

passiveAbilities.name: Agility
passiveAbilities.description: This character may move freely over Obstacles and Wooded Patches during Jog actions. Traverse actions cost this character 1 less energy.

arcaneAbilities.name: Swig o' rum
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target restores X+1 Wds and suffers -2 Arcane Stat until end of turn.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds and -2 Arcane Stat until end of turn.

arcaneAbilities.name: Black Powder Bomb
arcaneAbilities.description:
This attack is not modified by Evade Stat.
Target suffers X+1 Magical Dmg. Other models within 2" of the target suffer X Magical Dmg
Catastrophe: All models within 2" suffer 2 Wds.
